title: bidens brasiliensis
intro: Bidens brasiliensis, also known as Tie Breaker or Brazilian Beggar Ticks, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Bidens brasiliensis has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and then infusing them in hot water.
